<!-- Clear description of what you want to happen -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Are there other ways to solve the same problem? -->

## Ethical Verification
<!-- REQUIRED: Is this feature aligned with the SDIA Manifesto? -->
- [ ] Does not store PII beyond the 48h TTL
- [ ] Does not allow auditing third-party accounts without verified ownership
- [ ] Does not use private sources or intrusive techniques
- [ ] Maintains the educational and non-surveillance focus
